528 Q1A Q1A_RES_RETURN (Q1A) Resident Wishes to Return to Community CHAR 1 Discharge potential and overall status: discharge potential - resident wished to return to community. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
529 Q1B Q1B_SUPPORT_RES (Q1B) Resident Supported by Someone Positive Toward Discharge CHAR 1 Discharge potential and overall status: discharge potential - support person positive toward discharge. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
